lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Now you look like someone who goes to a lot of fancy dress parties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...what are you saying exactly?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: I'm just saying that perhaps you would like to peruse my selection of garments.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Or, if that doesn't interest you, then maybe you have something else to offer? I'm always on the look out for interesting or unusual new materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, let's see what you've got then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a spare Priest Gown?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well I do sell them. I don't hand them out for free though. This is a shop not a charity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please! It's really important.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well I suppose you can have this old one. It's not in good enough condition to sell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you make another eagle costume for me?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Certainly, if you can supply the materials. I'll need appropriate feathers, swamp tar and some yellow dye. It'll also cost you 25 gold pieces.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I might just leave the perusing for now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make clothing suitable for hunting?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Certainly. Take a look at my range of made-to-order items. If you can supply the furs, I'll gladly make any of these for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of unusual materials did you have in mind?

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Well, some more colourful feathers might be useful. For some surreal reason, all I normally seem to get offered are large quantities of rather beaten-up looking chicken feathers.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: People must have some very strange pastimes around these parts, that's all I can say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, let's see what you've got then.

lines.speaker: Asyff
lines.text: Sorry, we're closed at the moment.
